assertions.title: One explicit operator story is visible end-to-end

steps.action: Scan the requested workflow, endpoint-inventory, and handoff surfaces for canonical route presence
steps.expected: The surviving operator story should consistently read item setup -> production logs -> packing-records -> sales-owned dispatch confirm.
steps.observed: The requested contract surfaces all retain the canonical route chain (`/api/v1/catalog/items`, `POST /api/v1/factory/production/logs`, `POST /api/v1/factory/packing-records`, `POST /api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm`) across the workflow docs, endpoint inventory, frontend handoff, and endpoint inventory TSV scan.

steps.expected: Shared contract guards should accept the current canonical-path story.
steps.observed: check-codex-review-guidelines, guard_openapi_contract_drift, guard_workflow_canonical_paths, and guard_accounting_portal_scope_contract all completed successfully.

assertions.title: Removed routes and retired schemas are absent everywhere

steps.action: Inspect the requested operator-facing surfaces for retired ERP-38 routes
steps.expected: The requested runtime contract artifacts should not present retired ERP-38 routes as supported behavior.
steps.observed: The requested-surface scan found no exact matches for `/api/v1/dispatch/confirm`, `/api/v1/factory/production-batches`, `/api/v1/factory/pack`, `/api/v1/factory/packing-records/{productionLogId}/complete`, `/api/v1/catalog/products`, or `/api/v1/accounting/catalog/products` in the requested workflow docs, endpoint inventory, accounting portal handoff, frontend handoff/frontend-v2 notes, or endpoint_inventory.tsv.

steps.expected: OpenAPI/workflow/accounting-portal drift guards should stay green after the hard cut.
steps.observed: guard_openapi_contract_drift, guard_workflow_canonical_paths, and guard_accounting_portal_scope_contract all returned OK in the saved guard log.

frictions.description: The first attempt to spawn a user-testing flow-validator subagent failed with exit code 1 and no output.
frictions.resolution: Collected the required runtime, OpenAPI, docs, and regression evidence directly in the parent validator and wrote the flow reports manually, following the mission AGENTS fallback guidance.
